title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Keto Crust
description: A keto-friendly recipe featuring pan-seared snapper topped with a crispy almond flour crust. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season to taste with salt and pepper

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the snapper fillets with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Dip each snapper fillet into the almond flour, coating both sides evenly.
Add the coconut oil to the preheated skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the coated snapper fillets to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the snapper from the skillet and place on a plate to rest.
Repeat the process with the remaining snapper fillets.
